name: Nags Head Golf Links
address: 5615 S Seachase Dr, Nags Head, NC 27959
about: Nags Head Golf Links is a championship golf course in Nags Head, North Carolina, designed in the true Scottish links style. The course is nestled into the natural, windswept environment of the Outer Banks, featuring rolling dunes, wild sea grass, and coastal winds, providing an authentic and challenging golf experience. It is a perennial favorite of Golf Digest and Golfweek magazines, recognized for its high-quality setting and gameplay.
why_golfers_like_it: Scenic Outer Banks environment with natural dunes and sea grass
Host of prestigious tournaments and events
Membership benefits within the Invited Network

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining available at the Players Grille
Full bar service available at the clubhouse and Players Grille

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Players are encouraged to bring their own clubs, but rentals may be available. Contact the pro shop for details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers on-site dining at the Players Grille with a full bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on pace of play, but typically ranges from 4-5 hours for a standard round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and offers programs for juniors and youth, making it suitable for younger golfers.
